title: Kalkol #3633
definition:
Calcol or Chalcol = "sustaining"

 1) son or descendant of Zerah of Judah and one of the wise men with
    whom Solomon was compared
nasbUsage:
Definition: Calcol or Chalcol = "sustaining"

 1) son or descendant of Zerah of Judah and one of the wise men with
    whom Solomon was compared

    NASB:  an Isr. noted for his wisdom
